title: MLflow 3.0 is generally available
body:
MLflow 3.0 is now generally available.

MLflow 3.0 on Databricks delivers state-of-the-art experiment tracking, observability, and performance evaluation for machine learning models, generative AI applications, and agents on the Databricks Lakehouse. See [Get started with MLflow 3 for models](/aws/en/mlflow/mlflow-3-install).

ref_links.text: Get started with MLflow 3 for models
